generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: http://example.org/base#

instance FrictionIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights on joint friction parameters for control adjustment"
]

instance ControlParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of robot control parameters based on friction insights",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot motion and friction data"
]

instance JointFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionIdentificationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through model-based control",
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterAdjustmentAction
]

instance IntegratedVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization of robot performance data",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling of robot components",
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for multi-physics simulation models",
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for metadata management",
    DTDFVocab:enables IntegratedVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for real-time robot data display",
    DTDFVocab:enables IntegratedVisualizationService
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data from motor encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance CurrentSensorCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current measurement from current sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque derived from input current and motor position data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrentData, MotorEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from motor position data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration derived from angular velocity data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring angular position of the motor shaft",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind gearbox measuring angular position after gear transmission",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current I_M to the motor",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorCurrentData
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driven by input current I_M"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission producing torque τ_G"
]

instance CycloidalGear : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gear outputting torque τ_out"
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram model of the robot axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram model of the robot axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint friction identification",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for joint friction identification",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for joint friction identification",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for joint friction identification",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AASMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell metadata model for robot components",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGear, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor, SysMLBDDModel, SysMLIBDModel, CoulombViscousModel, StribeckModel, DahlModel, LuGreModel, AASMetadataModel, MotorEncoderPosition, SecondaryEncoderPosition, CurrentSensorCurrent, TorqueData, AngularVelocityData, AccelerationData
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; digital shadow functions as a passive entity with no data flow back to the physical system (as defined in the reference model)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing synchronized with live operational measurements from the robot."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Passive digital shadow integrating physical robot axis, engineering models (SysML), simulation models (Simulink), data traces, and processing components with unified dashboard visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational stage (as operated), utilizing live data during robot operation for friction analysis and control improvement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data versus measured reference values to detect deviations and refine friction models; deviation analysis specified as part of the digital shadow's purpose."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data transmission from physical sensors to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for industrial asset description and SysML for systems engineering modeling."
]
